rag_rules: Place range assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for AGREE expressions.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers and declared helpers.
Align helper declaration types with the types of the expressions they represent.
Avoid encoding AADL property associations as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed.
Validate that all identifiers in AGREE clauses are resolvable within the component scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contract clauses.
Define constants and equations with proper type annotations in AGREE annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
